title: Smaller Enderpearl
description: Makes the enderpearl smaller for better vision and cleaner gameplay
body:
# Smaller Enderpearl

Smaller Enderpearl is a minimal PvP-focused texture pack that reduces the size of the Ender Pearl for better visibility and cleaner gameplay.

A large Ender Pearl can block vision in critical moments. This pack makes the pearl smaller while keeping a vanilla-like appearance, helping you maintain full awareness during fights and movement.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c477cc86f730ca43801f78b0cb2d69eff258d8a9_0.webp)

## Features

- Reduced Ender Pearl size for improved visibility

- Clean, vanilla-style textures

- No performance impact

- Ideal for PvP and competitive play
